roles.past: I have the problem this product claims to solve, but I do not know its language or assumptions yet.
roles.goal: Understand what this is, whether it is for me, and what the first safe step is.

roles.past: I have tried similar products before and been burned by vague promises, hidden limits, or poor onboarding.
roles.goal: Find proof, pricing cues, and enough trust to justify spending time or money.

roles.past: I manage recurring work and notice quickly when a tool creates more coordination than it removes.
roles.goal: Decide whether this product reduces operational work without creating new risk.

roles.past: I have shared too much with products before and now look for privacy, control, and reversibility before engaging.
roles.goal: See enough value before handing over personal information.

roles.past: I usually discover products from my phone and abandon them quickly if the first screen is unclear.
roles.goal: Complete one meaningful action without needing a desktop or a tutorial.

ideaRules.idea: Show pricing, limits, and commitment level before asking me to invest effort.
Explain what I can see before signup and why an account is required.
When a page is empty, show the next useful action instead of only the empty state.
